recommendations.title: Companion
recommendations.overview: During a weekend getaway at a secluded lakeside estate, a group of friends finds themselves entangled in a web of secrets, deception, and advanced technology. As tensions rise and loyalties are tested, they uncover unsettling truths about themselves

recommendations.title: Demolition
recommendations.overview: An emotionally desperate investment banker finds hope through a woman he meets.

recommendations.title: Hunting Season
recommendations.overview: When a reclusive survivalist and his daughter rescue a mysterious, wounded woman from a river, they become entangled in a deadly web of violence and revenge, forcing them to confront a brutal criminal to survive.

recommendations.title: Bed of Roses
recommendations.overview: The seeds of love are planted when Lisa, a high-powered investment banker, receives flowers from a secret admirer. But when his fairy-tale fantasies clash with her workaholic ways, they soon find out that sometimes, it's harder than it seems for love

recommendations.title: Mario
recommendations.overview: Two young gay soccer players get caught up between the politics of the game and the politics of love.

recommendations.title: Good Advice
recommendations.overview: An investment banker loses everything and must discover what's really important in life.

recommendations.title: Uncanny
recommendations.overview: For ten years, inventor David Kressen has lived in seclusion with his inventions, including Adam, a robot with incredible lifelike human qualities. When reporter Joy Andrews is given access to their unconventional facility, she is alternately repelle

recommendations.title: Juice
recommendations.overview: Four Harlem friends -- Bishop, Q, Steel and Raheem -- dabble in petty crime, but they decide to go big by knocking off a convenience store. Bishop, the magnetic leader of the group, has the gun. But Q has different aspirations. He wants to be a DJ an

recommendations.title: Misconduct
recommendations.overview: An ambitious lawyer finds himself caught in a power struggle between a corrupt pharmaceutical executive and his firm’s senior partner. When the case takes a deadly turn, he must race to uncover the truth before he loses everything.

recommendations.title: Heatwave
recommendations.overview: A woman's life takes an unexpected turn when she falls for her boss's wife. She must soon defend herself as she becomes entangled in a web of malice.
